meaning: n.考试者,试验装置,检测器,华盖
examples: I have a battery tester in my garage.
A software tester, on the other hand, their entire goal is to look at this product and find problems with it, to improve it.
Sixty toddlers were each introduced to an adult tester holding a plastic container.
In Montana, state Senate President Jon Tester, a Democrat, was barely leading three-term incumbent Republican Sen.
But then there's Amkor Technology, a circuit board tester and packager in West Chester, Pa.
